page.content: The table presents data categorized by Pattern No, detailing expressed genes of the MRSA strains (n = 21), the number of strains (%), and the number of genes per pattern (n = 15) as a percentage. For Pattern No 1, the expressed genes are fnbA, fnbB, clfA, ebps, eap, sdrD, sdrE, and efb, with 10 strains (47.7%) and 15 genes (100%). Pattern No 2 includes fnbA, clfA, ebps, eap, sdrD, sdrE, and efb, showing 2 strains (9.5%) and 14 genes (93.3%). Pattern No 3 has fnbA, fnbB, clfA, ebps, eap, sdrD, and efb, with 2 strains (9.5%) and 14 genes (93.3%).
